name: grep
description: Search workspace contents by extended regex. Returns matched lines with path + line number. Always excludes .git/, target/, node_modules/, __pycache__/, and any path listed in .atelierignore (or .gitignore as a fallback). Subject to the §11 sandbox.

pattern.description: Extended regex pattern (POSIX ERE). The harness compiles once and reuses across files.

path.description: Workspace-relative or absolute root for the search. Default: repo root.

max_results.description: Cap on returned matches; the rest are dropped and `truncated: true` set.
